channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: librepods-org/librepods
item.description: AirPods liberated from Apple's ecosystem.

item.title: gamedev-skills/awesome-gamedev-agent-skills
item.description: Game-development Agent Skills for AI coding agents: install once and a master router loads the right skill for your engine and task. 66 original, version-pinned skills (plus a master router) in the portable SKILL.md format that runs across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Copilot, Gemini CLI and more, for Godot, Unity, Unreal, web and beyond.

item.title: tdeverx/contained-app
item.description: A native macOS app for Apple's Container CLI

item.title: yynxxxxx/Codex-5.5-codex-instruct-5.5
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Forward-Future/loopy
item.description: A library of practical AI-agent loops and an installable skill for finding, adapting, and designing repeatable agent workflows.

item.title: kageroumado/adrafinil
item.description: Keep your Mac awake only while AI coding agents are working

item.title: Krever/fintech-engineering-handbook
item.description: Patterns for building software that handles money

item.title: ivorpad/mercadona-cli
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Vanszs/qwencloud-generator
item.description: Automated QwenCloud account registration & API key harvester with multi-threading, TUI dashboard, proxy rotation, and Gmail OAuth

item.title: deepreinforce-ai/Ornith-1
item.description: (no description)

item.title: deepseek-ai/DeepSpec
item.description: DeepSpec: a full-stack codebase for training and evaluating speculative decoding algorithms

item.title: AlexandrosGounis/pdfx
item.description: An extension of the traditional PDF standard, allowing multiple files to be stored in a single file via metadata

item.title: CopilotKit/OpenTag
item.description: OpenTag

item.title: cclank/lanshu-animated-architecture-diagram
item.description: Premium hand-drawn animated architecture diagram Codex skill

item.title: Pluviobyte/video-production-skills
item.description: Reusable AI video production skills library for creation, recreation, motion design, openers, and QA.

item.title: workweave/router
item.description: Model router for agentic systems. Routes every prompt to the right model in <50ms. Cut costs 40-70% with just an endpoint change.

item.title: makerspet/oomwoo
item.description: Open-source vacuum robot cleaner

item.title: CoreBunch/Instatic
item.description: Instatic is a modern self-hosted visual CMS - get it running in 1 minute

item.title: FossPrime/Steam-Controller-Auto-Charge
item.description: Slam the controller into the magnetic puck until it charges

item.title: cobusgreyling/loop-engineering
item.description: Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny). Includes loop-audit, loop-init, loop-cost.

item.title: bikini/exploitarium
item.description: A single archive of public exploit PoCs and vulnerability research writeups. At the time I post these, none have been reported. Feel free to report them yourself and take credit for the CVE if handed out lulz

item.title: dmmulroy/skills
item.description: (no description)

item.title: facebook/astryx
item.description: An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready

item.title: adshao/flounder
item.description: Autonomous white-hat security auditor

item.title: inkeep/open-knowledge
item.description: Beautiful, AI-native markdown editor and LLM Wiki

item.title: josejuanqm/docky
item.description: (no description)

item.title: benchflow-ai/awesome-evals
item.description: A curated, non-BS library of the best resources for building and evaluating AI agents — papers, blogs, talks, tools, benchmarks. Maintained by BenchFlow.

item.title: DominikPeters/tikz-editor
item.description: A WYSIWYG editor for TikZ that parses TikZ code

item.title: mlc-ai/modern-gpu-programming-for-mlsys
item.description: modern gpu programming

item.title: emilkowalski/skills
item.description: Skills for Design Engineers.

item.title: QwenLM/Qwen-AgentWorld
item.description: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents

item.title: sums001/Windows-Copilot-API
item.description: Reverse engineered Windows Copilot into an OpenAI-compatible API. Access GPT-4 and GPT-5 models through a simple REST interface without API keys or billing.

item.title: HKUDS/AgentSpace
item.description: "AgentSpace: Human + Agents. One Team. One Workspace"

item.title: microsoft/fastcontext
item.description: FastContext: Training Efficient Repository Explorer for Coding Agents

item.title: baidu/Unlimited-OCR
item.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.

item.title: headroomlabs-ai/headroom
item.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

item.title: yorgai/ORG2
item.description: Open-source Cursor-style agent IDE — but built for reviewability and control. Built-in rust harness; supports 10+ CLIs.

item.title: raiyanyahya/recall
item.description: Stop wasting tokens and re-explaining your project every session. Recall gives Claude Code durable memory — entirely offline.

item.title: yandex/yaff
item.description: YaFF is a high-performance C++ serialization library that provides a zero-copy wire format for the Protobuf ecosystem.
